name: Rak page displays shelves and allows filtering

planSteps.description: Fill the email input with 'admin@siwono.local' and the password input with 'password123'
Click the 'Manajemen Rak' link in the sidebar
Verify the page heading 'Manajemen Rak' is visible and the table loads the list of shelves from the database
Select 'Yuridis Utama' from the Ruangan filter dropdown
Verify the table filters to show only shelves in the Yuridis Utama room
